spells.effect: Heals 2-7 hp or removes paralysis from one living creature.
spells.summary: Heals light damage or paralysis; reverse causes 2-7 damage by touch.

spells.effect: Magical objects, creatures, and places within 60 ft glow.
spells.summary: Caster sees magic within 60 ft glow for a short time.

spells.effect: Creates light in a 30 ft diameter volume; can blind if cast at eyes.
spells.summary: Creates torch-like light; reverse creates darkness.

spells.effect: Caster gains protective barrier: attacks -1, saves +1; enchanted creatures blocked.
spells.summary: Protects caster from hostile attacks and blocks enchanted melee contact.

spells.effect: Purifies spoiled/poisoned food or water; can settle mud into clear water.
spells.summary: Makes food and water safe; does not affect living creatures.

spells.effect: Calms one living creature and may end magical fear with a bonus save.
spells.summary: Removes fear; reverse causes fear.

spells.effect: Creatures within 30 ft resist freezing; +2 saves vs cold and -1 damage per die.
spells.summary: Party near caster resists cold and cold-based attacks.

spells.effect: Friendly creatures in 20 ft square gain +1 morale, hit, and damage before melee.
spells.summary: Bless buffs allies not yet in melee; reverse penalizes enemies.

spells.effect: Traps within 30 ft glow blue when the cleric approaches.
spells.summary: Reveals presence of traps, not type or removal method.

spells.effect: Paralyzes up to 4 humanoids; single target saves at -2.
spells.summary: Paralyzes humanoids; reverse frees held persons.

spells.effect: Reveals alignment of one creature, item, or area within 10 ft.
spells.summary: Identifies alignment; reverse masks with false alignment.

spells.effect: Creates 30 ft diameter silence; moving target may carry effect if save fails.
spells.summary: Stops speech and spellcasting inside the silent area.

spells.effect: Charms 1 HD of snakes per caster level; no save.
spells.summary: Snakes sway harmlessly unless attacked; shorter duration in combat.

spells.effect: Caster speaks with one named animal type within 30 ft.
spells.summary: Talks to a chosen animal type; reactions are usually favorable.

spells.effect: Creates daylight-bright 60 ft sphere; can blind if cast at eyes.
spells.summary: Permanent daylight effect; reverse creates continual darkness.

spells.effect: Cures one disease; high-level caster can cure lycanthropy.
spells.summary: Cures disease; reverse inflicts wasting disease.

spells.effect: Doubles size, strength, damage, and carrying capacity of one animal.
spells.summary: Enlarges normal or giant animal without changing behavior.

spells.effect: Caster senses direction of one known object within 120 ft.
spells.summary: Detects direction only; does not locate creatures.

spells.effect: Removes one curse from creature, item, or area; some removals may be temporary.
spells.summary: Removes curses; reverse applies a misfortune or penalty.

spells.effect: One weapon gains +1d6 damage per attack and can harm magic-only targets for that bonus.
spells.summary: Temporarily empowers a weapon with extra striking damage.

spells.effect: Bends or warps wooden items, usually spoiling weapons, doors, or small objects.
spells.summary: Warps wood; useful against bows, doors, shafts, and similar items.

spells.effect: Creates a spring with water for 12 men and mounts, plus more at higher levels.
spells.summary: Creates drinking water from ground or wall for one hour.

spells.effect: Heals 4-14 hp damage to one living creature.
spells.summary: Heals serious wounds; reverse causes 4-14 damage by touch.

spells.effect: Neutralizes poison in creature, container, or object; can revive poison death within 10 rounds.
spells.summary: Makes poison harmless; reverse creates lethal poison.

spells.effect: 20 ft diameter barrier gives allies +1 saves, attackers -1 hit, and blocks enchanted melee.
spells.summary: Area version of protection from evil centered on caster.

spells.effect: Caster speaks with plants within 30 ft and can request simple favors.
spells.summary: Allows plant communication and passage through vegetation.

spells.effect: Turns 2-16 sticks into snakes that obey the cleric.
spells.summary: Creates temporary snake servants from sticks.

spells.effect: Cleric asks higher powers three yes/no questions; usable rarely.
spells.summary: Ask divine powers limited questions for guidance.

spells.effect: Creates food for 12 men and mounts for one day, more at higher levels.
spells.summary: Creates sustaining food for a group and mounts.

spells.effect: Cures 6-21 hp damage to one living creature; reverse causes same damage by touch.
spells.summary: Major cure spell; reverse causes critical wounds by touch.

spells.effect: Banishing/protective power against enchanted or summoned evil creatures and curses.
spells.summary: Can drive away or destroy evil magical influence at close range.

spells.effect: Summons a 60 ft swarm cloud that drives away creatures under 3 HD.
spells.summary: Creates a large insect swarm that disrupts weak creatures.

spells.effect: Compels a creature to perform or avoid a task; refusal causes penalties.
spells.summary: Places a divine obligation; reverse removes quest.

spells.effect: Restores a dead human/demi-human within time limit; recipient returns weak.
spells.summary: Raises dead; reverse can slay like finger of death.

spells.effect: Reveals hidden, invisible, ethereal, disguised, and polymorphed things within 120 ft; also reveals alignment and power.
spells.summary: Powerful true-seeing effect within 120 ft.

spells.effect: Summons an aerial servant to fetch a described creature or item from an approximate location.
spells.summary: Summons servant to retrieve one named target.

spells.effect: Creates a 30 ft diameter by 30 ft high wall of whirling hammers; passing through causes 7-70 damage.
spells.summary: Blocks passage with damaging hammer barrier; reverse removes clerical/magical walls.

spells.effect: Creates 1 large, 3 medium, or 6 small normal loyal animals that obey the cleric.
spells.summary: Creates temporary normal animals under command.

spells.effect: Shakes earth in a large area, damaging structures and opening cracks that may engulf creatures.
spells.summary: Creates destructive earth tremors over a scaling area.

spells.effect: Affects all creatures within 40 ft whose alignment differs from the cleric: may kill, stun, or deafen by level.
spells.save: spells negates for level 13+ or same alignment
spells.summary: Alignment-based area word with severe effects.

spells.effect: Restores one full level of energy experience lost to energy drain; reverse drains one level.
spells.summary: Restores one drained level; reverse drains one level.

spells.effect: Raises any living creature; humans and demi-humans return fully healed and ready to act.
spells.summary: Full resurrection; reverse obliterates living targets like the spell affects undead.

spells.effect: Outlines detected creatures or objects with harmless green fire; attacks against them gain +2 to hit.
spells.summary: Outlines targets and makes them easier to hit.

spells.effect: Caster senses direction of one known animal, plant, or natural outdoor object within range.
spells.summary: Nature-focused locate effect.

spells.effect: Caster accurately predicts natural weather in the local area for the next 12 hours.
spells.summary: Predicts upcoming natural weather.

spells.effect: Creates a misty cloud around the druid, heavily obscuring sight in a 10 ft radius per level.
spells.summary: Creates fog-like concealment around caster.

spells.effect: Creates a magical flame in the druid's hand that can ignite objects or be thrown.
spells.summary: Creates controllable magical fire.

spells.effect: Bends and warps wooden weapons, doors, or objects, often making them useless.
spells.summary: Warps wooden objects out of shape.

spells.effect: Calls lightning bolts from stormy skies; each bolt deals heavy electrical damage in an area.
spells.summary: Calls lightning during a storm.

spells.effect: Paralyzes normal or giant animals of animal intelligence within range.
spells.summary: Holds animal targets immobile.

spells.effect: Allows one air-breathing creature to breathe water; reverse lets water-breathers breathe air.
spells.summary: Allows breathing in water.

spells.effect: Changes temperature within 10 ft of the caster to extreme heat or cold.
spells.summary: Controls local temperature around caster.

spells.effect: Protects one creature from lightning damage, including natural and magical lightning.
spells.summary: Grants lightning protection.

spells.effect: Personal invisible barrier blocks attacks from plants and plant-like monsters.
spells.summary: Blocks plant attacks around caster.

spells.effect: Calms or increases winds within range; can affect air creatures with proper control.
spells.summary: Controls wind strength around caster.

spells.effect: Charms one humanoid as a trusted friend; repeat saves based on Intelligence.
spells.summary: Makes a humanoid friendly unless save succeeds.

spells.effect: Magic within 60 ft glows to the caster.
spells.summary: Caster sees magical auras nearby.

spells.effect: Creates floating disc carrying up to 5,000 cn, following caster.
spells.summary: Creates a hovering carrier for treasure or gear.

spells.effect: Magically holds one door, gate, or similar portal shut.
spells.summary: Holds a portal closed unless forced or magically opened.

spells.effect: Creates 30 ft diameter light; can blind if targeted.
spells.summary: Creates light; reverse creates darkness.

spells.effect: Creates unerring magical missile(s) dealing 1d6+1 damage each.
spells.summary: Automatically hits visible target within range.

spells.effect: Caster gains attacks -1, saves +1, and enchanted creatures are blocked.
spells.summary: Protects caster from hostile and enchanted melee attacks.

spells.effect: Caster reads unknown languages, codes, maps, and inscriptions.
spells.summary: Translates written language but not magical writing.

spells.effect: Caster reads magical writing and scrolls.
spells.summary: Allows reading spell books, scrolls, and magical inscriptions.

spells.effect: Invisible barrier improves AC and blocks magic missiles.
spells.summary: Defensive shield protects caster, especially from missiles.

spells.effect: Puts 2d8 HD of creatures to sleep, usually affecting weakest first.
spells.summary: Drops low-HD enemies asleep; no save.

spells.effect: Caster makes voice or sound appear to come from elsewhere.
spells.summary: Throws the caster’s voice to mislead listeners.

spells.effect: Creates daylight-bright 60 ft sphere; can blind if targeted.
spells.summary: Permanent light; reverse creates continual darkness.

spells.effect: Detects evil intentions or evil-enchanted objects.
spells.summary: Reveals evil intent or magic, not traps or poison.

spells.effect: Caster can see invisible creatures and objects within range.
spells.summary: Reveals invisible things to caster.

spells.effect: Caster reads surface thoughts in one direction through some barriers.
spells.summary: Reads thoughts of creatures in range and direction.

spells.effect: One creature or object becomes invisible until attacking/casting or dispelled.
spells.summary: Makes target invisible until it takes hostile action.

spells.effect: Opens stuck, locked, barred, or magically held portals.
spells.summary: Opens locked or held doors and similar closures.

spells.effect: Caster moves up or down vertically by mental control.
spells.summary: Allows vertical movement but not horizontal flight.

spells.effect: Caster senses direction of a known object within 60 ft + 10 ft/level.
spells.summary: Detects direction of a familiar object.

spells.effect: Creates 1d4 illusory duplicates that may absorb attacks.
spells.summary: Creates duplicate images to confuse attackers.

spells.effect: Creates a visual illusion in a 20 ft cube.
spells.summary: Creates an illusion sustained by concentration.

spells.effect: Fills up to 10x10x10 ft with sticky webs, entangling creatures.
spells.summary: Entangles creatures; fire can burn webs away.

spells.effect: Magically locks a portal; higher-level casters may bypass.
spells.summary: Long-term magical lock on door or portal.

spells.effect: See through the eyes of one creature in range.
spells.summary: Remote sight through another creature.

spells.effect: Ends spell effects in 20 ft cube; higher-level effects may resist.
spells.summary: Removes active spell effects, not magic items.

spells.effect: 20 ft radius explosion deals 1d6 fire damage per caster level.
spells.summary: Area fire blast; capped by caster level rules.

spells.effect: Target flies at 360 ft/turn with concentration.
spells.summary: Grants controlled flight for variable duration.

spells.effect: Up to 24 creatures move and attack at double speed.
spells.summary: Speeds allies; multiple haste effects do not stack.

spells.effect: Paralyzes up to 4 humanoids; single target saves at -2.
spells.summary: Paralyzes humanoids like cleric spell.

spells.effect: Gives 60 ft infravision.
spells.summary: Grants heat-sight in darkness.

spells.effect: All within 10 ft of target become invisible until attacking/casting or leaving area.
spells.summary: Group invisibility centered on target.

spells.effect: Bolt deals 1d6 lightning damage per caster level, bouncing off barriers.
spells.summary: Line attack with rebound risk.

spells.effect: 20 ft diameter protection from evil around caster.
spells.summary: Area protective barrier against evil/enchanted attacks.

spells.effect: One target is immune to small nonmagical missiles.
spells.summary: Blocks normal arrows, bolts, and similar missiles.

spells.effect: One target can breathe underwater.
spells.summary: Allows underwater breathing for a day.

spells.effect: Charms one or more living creatures as friends.
spells.summary: Like charm person but works on monsters.

spells.effect: Confuses creatures in 60 ft area, causing random actions.
spells.summary: Area mental confusion.

spells.effect: Teleports caster or one target up to 360 ft.
spells.summary: Short-range teleport without error.

spells.effect: Thickens vegetation into an impassable barrier.
spells.summary: Turns plants into dense obstacle.

spells.effect: Creates terrain illusion over outdoor area.
spells.summary: Makes terrain appear different.

spells.effect: Makes up to 100 creatures look like trees/woods.
spells.summary: Camouflages a group as woodland.

spells.effect: Changes one creature into another form.
spells.summary: Transforms a target creature.

spells.effect: Caster assumes another form with movement but not special attacks.
spells.summary: Caster shapeshifts temporarily.

spells.effect: Removes a curse; reverse bestows curse.
spells.summary: Removes magical curse or cursed item bond.

spells.effect: Creates fiery wall damaging creatures passing through.
spells.summary: Fire barrier, especially strong vs cold creatures.

spells.effect: Creates wall or hemisphere of ice.
spells.summary: Creates solid ice barrier.

spells.effect: Invisible magical eye scouts under caster control.
spells.summary: Remote scouting sensor.

spells.effect: Creates skeletons or zombies from remains.
spells.summary: Animates undead servants.

spells.effect: Creates moving poisonous cloud killing weak creatures.
spells.summary: Poison cloud deadly to low-HD creatures.

spells.effect: Summons and controls one 16 HD elemental.
spells.summary: Summons elemental; loss of concentration is dangerous.

spells.effect: Reduces spellcaster intelligence to near animal level.
spells.summary: Disables enemy spellcasters.

spells.effect: Paralyzes up to 4 creatures; single target saves at -2.
spells.summary: Hold person for monsters.

spells.effect: Caster’s life force inhabits a container and may possess bodies.
spells.summary: Body-swapping possession through a jar focus.

spells.effect: Creates passage through solid rock or wall.
spells.summary: Opens temporary tunnel through barrier.

spells.effect: Moves objects by mental force up to caster weight limit.
spells.summary: Moves objects at range by concentration.

spells.effect: Teleports one creature/object to known destination, with error risk.
spells.summary: Long-distance teleport based on familiarity.

spells.effect: Creates barrier around caster blocking magic in or out.
spells.summary: Caster is insulated from magic but cannot cast through shell.

spells.effect: Kills 4d8 HD of living creatures in 60 ft cube.
spells.summary: Slays groups of weaker living creatures.

spells.effect: Disintegrates one creature or nonmagical object.
spells.summary: Destroys target if save fails.

spells.effect: Compels a creature to perform a task or suffer penalties.
spells.summary: Magical command binding target to a task.

spells.effect: Summons invisible stalker to perform a task.
spells.summary: Invisible servant hunts or retrieves as commanded.

spells.effect: Lowers water level in a large area.
spells.summary: Creates passage through or reduces water.

spells.effect: Moves soil terrain slowly, reshaping earth.
spells.summary: Large-scale earthmoving, not stone.

spells.effect: Parts water to create dry path.
spells.summary: Opens a passage through water.

spells.effect: Creates image through which caster can cast spells.
spells.summary: Remote image acts as spellcasting origin.

spells.effect: Returns dead character as a new body/creature.
spells.summary: Restores life in a new form.

spells.effect: Restores petrified creature; reverse turns flesh to stone.
spells.summary: Reverses petrification; reverse petrifies a target.

spells.effect: Creates a delayed fire ball that explodes after a chosen delay, dealing up to 20d6 fire damage.
spells.summary: Fire ball with chosen detonation delay.

spells.effect: Creates an invisible magical passage through up to 10 ft of nonliving material; reverse creates magic lock.
spells.summary: Creates secret passage; reverse locks portal.

spells.effect: Makes many creatures or objects invisible within a 60 ft square area; reverse reveals invisibility.
spells.summary: Grants invisibility to many targets.

spells.effect: Stuns one creature with 70 hp or fewer; lower hp targets are stunned longer.
spells.summary: Stuns a low-hit-point target without save.

spells.effect: Causes creatures and objects in a 30 ft cube to fall upward, then fall back when gravity returns.
spells.summary: Briefly reverses gravity in an area.

spells.effect: Charms multiple creatures with total levels or Hit Dice based on caster level; reverse removes charm.
spells.summary: Charms many creatures at once.

spells.effect: Creates a magical rune with one chosen effect triggered by reading, touching, or passing.
spells.summary: Creates triggered magical symbol.

spells.effect: Creates four or eight fiery meteors that explode for heavy fire damage in selected areas.
spells.summary: Creates multiple explosive meteors.

spells.effect: Kills one or more creatures within hit point limits; no saving throw.
spells.summary: Kills low-hit-point targets without save.

spells.effect: Cures one major affliction or nearly all damage, leaving only 1-6 damage remaining.
spells.summary: Cures one condition or nearly all wounds.

spells.effect: Allows the druid to pass through trees and dense plant growth as if through a doorway.
spells.summary: Moves through plant matter.

spells.effect: Short-range teleportation from one tree into another tree of the same type.
spells.summary: Tree-to-tree teleport.

spells.effect: Personal invisible barrier blocks attacks from normal and giant animals and animal-intelligence creatures.
spells.summary: Blocks animal attacks around caster.

spells.effect: Long-range plant teleport; druid enters one living plant and exits another on the same plane.
spells.summary: Long-range travel through living plants.

spells.effect: Summons weather appropriate to the climate and season over a broad area.
spells.summary: Calls appropriate natural weather.

spells.effect: Summons a swarm of insects that moves as directed and deals damage to creatures it engulfs.
spells.summary: Summons deadly insect swarm.

spells.effect: Transforms metal items in the area into wood, affecting weapons, armor, and gear.
spells.summary: Turns metal objects into wood.

spells.effect: Allows the druid to choose and control local outdoor weather while concentrating.
spells.summary: Controls outdoor weather.

spells.effect: Contact an Outer Plane Immortal to ask 3-12 questions, risking insanity for better knowledge.
spells.summary: Ask questions of an Immortal with risk of insanity.

spells.effect: Turns up to 3,000 square ft of rock or soil into mud; reverse hardens mud to rock permanently.
spells.summary: Liquefies ground into mud; reverse hardens mud.

spells.effect: Creates a stone wall or shape that can be used as a barrier or structure.
spells.summary: Creates permanent stone wall.

spells.effect: Creates a vertical iron wall that can block passage or topple to damage targets.
spells.summary: Creates permanent iron wall.

spells.effect: Changes outdoor weather in a broad area while the caster concentrates.
spells.summary: Controls outdoor weather.

spells.effect: Charms plant creatures or controls ordinary plant growth in an area.
spells.summary: Controls plants or charms plant monsters.

spells.effect: Creates normal monsters up to total Hit Dice equal to caster level; they obey commands then vanish.
spells.summary: Creates temporary normal monsters.

spells.effect: Reveals detailed knowledge about one item, place, or person, with time required varying by familiarity.
spells.summary: Researches lore of an item, place, or person.

spells.effect: Caster may become a stone statue and return to normal once per round during the spell.
spells.summary: Caster can shift into statue form.

spells.effect: Summons one nonliving object from the caster's home to hand, if prepared and not blocked.
spells.summary: Calls a prepared object to the caster.

spells.effect: Creates a magical sword of force that attacks as directed by the caster.
spells.summary: Creates floating magical attacking sword.

spells.effect: Teleports one object to a known destination; mishap chances apply by familiarity.
spells.summary: Teleports an object.

spells.effect: Forces one touched victim to dance helplessly, losing AC and saves while unable to act.
spells.summary: Makes touched victim dance helplessly.

spells.effect: Creates a moving poisonous cloud that can also explode if touched by fire.
spells.summary: Creates deadly cloud that may explode.

spells.effect: Protects caster from ESP, crystal balls, and similar mind-reading or scrying; reverse opens mind to reading.
spells.summary: Blocks mental detection and scrying.

spells.effect: Makes certain spell effects permanent, subject to restrictions and dispel magic.
spells.summary: Makes eligible magic effects permanent.

spells.effect: Changes one object or creature into another form; duration depends on similarity.
spells.summary: Transforms almost any object or creature.

spells.effect: Blinds one or more creatures with hit point limits; no saving throw.
spells.summary: Blinds targets by current hit points.

spells.effect: Opens a gate to another plane or calls a powerful creature; reverse closes a gate.
spells.summary: Opens planar gate or calls entity.

spells.effect: Banishes one creature into an extradimensional maze until it escapes after a time based on Intelligence.
spells.summary: Traps target in extradimensional maze.
